creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Quite soon, llvm and clang 3.6.0 will be released.  At the moment, I have imported 3.6.0 RC2 into the projects/clang360-import branch.

I would like to ask for an exp-run using this branch, to find regressions before the actual release gets merged into head.

For testing, please use the projects/clang360-import branch here:

svn://svn.freebsd.org/base/projects/clang360-import

This has been updated to head r278350.
